title: dactylis polygama f. pallida
intro: Dactylis polygama f. pallida, also known as a variety of orchard grass, is a type of perennial grass that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Dactylis polygama f. pallida include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
